SEARCH
Package org.key_project.util.collection

Interface ImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object>

All Superinterfaces:
Iterable<T>, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultImmutableSet
public interface ImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object> extends Iterable<T>, Serializable
interface implemented by non-destructive Sets. CONVENTION: Each SetOf implementation has to offer a public static final variable .nil()

  • Method Details

    • collector

      static <T extends @Nullable Object> Collector<T,Set<T>,ImmutableSet<T>> collector()
      Returns a Collector that accumulates the input elements into a new ImmutableSet.
      Returns:
      a Collector that accumulates the input elements into a new ImmutableSet.

    • singleton

      static <T extends @Nullable Object> ImmutableSet<T> singleton(T obj)
      Builds a single set with the given obj.

    • empty

      static <T extends @Nullable Object> ImmutableSet<T> empty()

    • toSet

      Set<T> toSet()
      Returns:
      a Set containing the same elements as this ImmutableSet

    • add

      ImmutableSet<T> add(T element)
      Adds an element
      Returns:
      a set containing all elements of this one and the specified element.

    • union

      ImmutableSet<T> union(ImmutableSet<? extends T> set)
      Returns:
      union of this set with set

    • intersect

      ImmutableSet<T> intersect(ImmutableSet<? extends T> set)
      Returns:
      intersection of this set with set

    • iterator

      Iterator<T> iterator()
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<T extends @Nullable Object>
      Returns:
      Iterator of the set

    • stream

      Stream<T> stream()
      Returns:
      Stream of the set

    • exists

      boolean exists(Predicate<T> predicate)
      return true if predicate is fullfilled for at least one element
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate
      Returns:
      true if predicate is fullfilled for at least one element

    • contains

      boolean contains(@Nullable Object obj)
      Returns:
      true iff obj in set

    • subset

      boolean subset(ImmutableSet<? extends @Nullable Object> s)
      Returns:
      true iff this set is subset of set s

    • size

      int size()
      Returns:
      int the cardinality of the set

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      Returns:
      true iff the set is empty

    • remove

      ImmutableSet<T> remove(T element)
      Returns:
      set without element

    • equals

      boolean equals(@Nullable Object o)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Returns:
      true iff this set is subset of o and vice versa.

    • hashCode

      int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • addUnique

      ImmutableSet<T> addUnique(T element) throws NotUniqueException
      adds an element, barfs if the element is already present
      Parameters:
      element - of type that has to be added to this set
      Throws:
      NotUniqueException - if the element is already present
